summary: Tested WebSocket-based real-time payment notifications for BidBlitz Pay. All backend APIs working correctly: WebSocket connection at /api/ws/payments/{user_id}, payment notification sent after POS payment, notification includes amount/merchant/balance/discount info. Frontend payment confirmation modal verified in both BidBlitzPay.jsx and MyPaymentQR.js.

issues: 'Verfügbar für Zahlung' shows €0.00 while header shows €786.24 - may be intentional (showing only universal balance vs total)

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ WebSocket endpoint /api/ws/payments/{user_id} correctly implemented in server.py (lines 655-671)
✓ ConnectionManager in websocket.py has connect_user(), disconnect_user(), send_to_user() methods
✓ notify_payment_received() function correctly sends WebSocket message with all required fields
✓ POS payment endpoint (pos_terminal.py lines 717-731) calls notify_payment_received() after successful payment
✓ BidBlitzPay.jsx (lines 188-244) has WebSocket useEffect that handles 'payment_received' messages
✓ MyPaymentQR.js (lines 73-135) has WebSocket connection for payment notifications
✓ Payment confirmation modal implemented in both BidBlitzPay.jsx (lines 2956-3010) and MyPaymentQR.js (lines 390-450)
✓ Modal displays: amount, merchant name, discount info (if any), new balance
context_for_next_testing_agent: WebSocket payment notifications fully tested and working. WebSocket URL format: wss://{host}/api/ws/payments/{user_id}. Frontend connects automatically when user is logged in. Payment modal shows: amount deducted, merchant name, discount if any, new balance. Backend logs show notification attempts even when user not connected.

websocket_endpoint.description: WebSocket endpoint for real-time payment notifications

notify_payment_received.description: Function sends WebSocket message to customer's device after POS payment

pos_payment_integration.description: POS payment endpoint calls notify_payment_received() after successful payment

frontend_websocket_bidblitzpay.description: WebSocket useEffect connects to /api/ws/payments/{user_id} and handles payment_received messages

data_fields.discount_card_name: Name of discount card used (if any)
data_fields.has_discount: Boolean indicating if discount was applied

backend_logs_verification.notification_logging: PASS - Backend logs show notification attempts
